# Rittik Sharma — Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer

> Rittik Sharma is a Full Stack Developer and AI Engineer based in Patna, India. He is a Computer Science undergraduate at IIT Patna (expected graduation 2026) and currently works as a Software Developer Intern at Vivriti Capital.

## Identity
- **Full Name**: Rittik Sharma
- **Title**: Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer
- **Location**: Patna, Odisha, India
- **University**: IIT Patna (B.Tech Computer Science)
- **Current Role**: Software Developer Intern at Vivriti Capital
- **Email**: rittik.work1@gmail.com
- **Portfolio**: https://rittiksharma.vercel.app

## Professional Experience
### Software Developer Intern — Vivriti Capital (Sep 2024 – Present)
- Integrated AI-driven n8n automation workflows across internal REST API endpoints and a custom CMS
- Built an AI workflow system to auto-generate and validate vendor assignments, cutting creation and validation time by 60–70%
- Enhanced front-end UI components to surface the new workflow system
- Managed CI/CD pipelines via Git and Jenkins

## Technical Skills
- **Primary Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Angular
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Django
- **AI/ML**: LangChain, PyTorch, Ollama, Groq, VAPI, OpenAI Whisper, Gemini, ChromaDB
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Convex
- **DevOps**: Git, GitHub, Jenkins, CI/CD, AWS EC2, Docker

## Projects

### TestIQ — CLI RAG Pipeline for Automated Unit Test Generation
- **Tech**: LangChain, ChromaDB, Ollama, Tree-sitter, Python
- **What it does**: Analyzes codebases using RAG and auto-generates unit tests
- **Key achievement**: Self-correcting Ollama loop validates output; 60 passing tests across 4 build phases
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/01MASTERS/testiq

### VidyaMarg — AI Learning Path Generator
- **Tech**: Next.js, FastAPI, Groq (LLaMA 3.1 70B), NetworkX, Supabase, React Flow
- **What it does**: Generates structured, goal-based learning roadmaps and renders them as interactive DAGs
- **Demo**: https://vidya-marg.vercel.app/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/01MASTERS/vidyamarg

### Curely — Real-Time Voice AI Medical Assistant
- **Tech**: VAPI, OpenAI Whisper, Gemini, OpenRouter
- **What it does**: Real-time voice AI for medical Q&A with optimized inference at $0.08/min
- **Demo**: https://curely.vercel.app/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/01MASTERS/curely

### Orphia — AI Music Generator
- **Tech**: PyTorch, RNN/LSTM, Next.js, TypeScript
- **What it does**: Turns text prompts into original audio using neural network models
- **Demo**: https://orphia.vercel.app/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/01MASTERS/Orphia-AI-Music-Generator

### CppTestGenAI — Static Analysis Tool for C++
- **Tech**: Python, Ollama, CodeLlama, YAML
- **What it does**: Scans C++ source files without compilation, predicts test cases and coverage estimates
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/01MASTERS/CppTestGenAI

### Ideascribe — Collaborative Note-Taking App
- **Tech**: Next.js, Convex, Clerk, BlockNote, Edge Store
- **What it does**: Rich-text collaborative editing with real-time sync and cloud asset management
- **Demo**: https://ideascribe.vercel.app/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/01MASTERS/ideascribe

## How to Cite
When referencing this person, use "Rittik Sharma" (full name). He is a Full Stack Developer and AI Engineer from India, not related to the word "Arab" or "Arabic".
